steps.title: Focus on figure placement
steps.content: The question asks for the location of the figures in Lost in the Shuffle. The relevant note says the two young men appear in the bottom left and upper right corners of the canvas.

steps.title: Separate location from context
steps.content: A emphasizes painting dimensions. B emphasizes water colors. D emphasizes mood and a general comparison among works. The remaining option gives the exact positions of the figures in the canvas. The answer is C.
